title: Zithium ChatFilter
description: A very simple yet effective chat filtering plugin.
body:
A simple chat filtering plugin designed to keep your chat clean and safe for all users. 
[![AspireHosting banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fae58a5ceab764af4dae42b886d938e8b860dec_0.webp)](https://aspirehosting.net/aff.php?aff=21)

Permissions:
- chatfilter.bypass - Bypasses the chat filter.
